title: adesmia glomerula
intro: Adesmia glomerula, also known as the "Glomerular milkpea", is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, native to the Andes mountain range in South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Adesmia glomerula include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Adesmia glomerula is typically prepared for medicinal use through the extraction of its leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures.
